/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkesblackboard.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesblackboard.so CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/interface_observer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/net/interface_observer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/net/interface_listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/net/ilist_content.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/net/interface_proxy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/net/handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/shmem/lister.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/shmem/header.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/interface_list_maintainer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/internal/memory_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/internal/interface_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/internal/notifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/internal/instance_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/internal/message_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/interface_listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/utils/on_message_waker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/utils/on_update_waker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/remote.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/local.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/blackboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesblackboard.dir/ownership.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesinterface.so -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -L/usr/lib64 -lmagic -ldaemon -lm -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lstdc++ -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0
